result:
Implementation done. Summary of changes to `model/`:

**model/model.py**: reinstated exp 26's design — `_build_pretrained_trunk()` now loads `mnv3s_features10.pt` (features[:11]) with block 9 stride relaxed 2→1 and block 10 dilated (2,2)/padding(4,4), keeping the 8×8 grid at 96 channels; `export_onnx` now exports fp32, keeps it as `<area>_fp32_debug.onnx`, and int8-quantizes MatMul/Gemm only into the final artifact.

**model/train.py**: added the new mechanism — `split_fit_cal()` partitions train crops into a fit set and a block-held-out calibration set (`CAL_BLOCK_MOD=10`, buffer-excluded), `train_area()` trains only on `fit_crops`, and `calibrate_conf_shift()` now calibrates on the passed-in `cal_crops` instead of re-drawing from all train crops.

Verified via smoke tests: param counts (1,305,002 total / 576,464 trunk) and trunk output shape (1,96,8,8) match exactly; `split_fit_cal` on berlin gives disjoint fit/cal sets (92.4%/9.2%, plus buffer); export produces a 3,091,446-byte int8 ONNX (under the 4 MiB gate) with correct (1,3) output and ~4.6 ms median latency (under the 250 ms gate). Syntax check (`import model.train, model.model`) passes.
